coordinate_system.origin: grounded at local model floor, centered approximately at broadphase center

contents_note: These are real low-poly GLB mesh assets with named parts and PBR materials. They are not concept images. They are not rigged or animated; use them as game-ready visual prototypes/base meshes.

01_sylvan_juggernaut.glb.name: The Sylvan Juggernaut

mechanic_hooks.Ablative Armor: Use named bark plates as destroyable visual chunks or material swap states.
mechanic_hooks.Rooting Strike: Fist/root meshes mark the intended slam and ground-root silhouette.
mechanic_hooks.Regrowth: Bark plate names can be re-enabled/re-grown by gameplay logic.

01_sylvan_juggernaut.glb.recommended_runtime_notes: Use separate gameplay colliders for bark plates, fists, and torso health core.

02_scrap_stalker.glb.name: The Scrap-Stalker

mechanic_hooks.Hydraulic Pounce: Right mechanical hind leg and piston nodes indicate leap power.
mechanic_hooks.Overclock: Electric wire/eye materials can be intensified or swapped during 30% HP phase.
mechanic_hooks.EMP Howl: Head/muzzle area is the source socket for short-range EMP effect.

02_scrap_stalker.glb.recommended_runtime_notes: Attach leap VFX to right_hydraulic_upper_piston and EMP VFX to angular_stalker_head/spit front.

03_nexus_swarmers_cluster.glb.name: The Nexus Swarmers

mechanic_hooks.Swarm Mentality: Cluster file includes multiple parasite bodies for group presentation.
mechanic_hooks.Adaptive Evolution: Fusion links visualize the evolution trigger state.

03_nexus_swarmers_cluster.glb.recommended_runtime_notes: For individual enemies, duplicate one crystal body/eye group or use this cluster as a spawn preview.

03b_nexus_warden_evolved.glb.name: Nexus Warden Evolved

mechanic_hooks.Adaptive Evolution Result: Spawn this asset when Swarmers survive and fuse.
mechanic_hooks.Long-Range Beam: Use warden_long_range_beam_core as the beam source socket.

03b_nexus_warden_evolved.glb.recommended_runtime_notes: Included as a bonus because the Swarmer concept explicitly evolves into this enemy.

04_void_anomaly.glb.name: The Void Anomaly

mechanic_hooks.Phase Shift: Ghost silhouettes and glitch fragments support alpha/emission flicker during intangibility.
mechanic_hooks.Reality Tear: Broken rift arcs can be separated or used as a source for battlefield rift VFX.

04_void_anomaly.glb.recommended_runtime_notes: Use alpha material animation and temporarily disable damage collision during Phase Shift.

05_tremor_fiend.glb.name: The Tremor-Fiend

mechanic_hooks.Metronome Strike: Mallet forelimbs and fists define the rhythmic ground-slam animation targets.
mechanic_hooks.Sonic Bellow: Throat sacs provide telegraph material for expanding/glowing before cone attack.

05_tremor_fiend.glb.recommended_runtime_notes: Drive throat sac scale/emission for telegraph timing; shockwave should be gameplay/VFX separate.

06_iron_jaw_hound.glb.name: The Iron-Jaw Hound
06_iron_jaw_hound.glb.kind: low quadruped grappler with reinforced jaw

mechanic_hooks.The Latch: Jaw plates and front bite zone indicate grapple source.
mechanic_hooks.Ally Assist: Back/collar area supports vault-kick target marker.

06_iron_jaw_hound.glb.recommended_runtime_notes: Separate bite/grapple collider should be active only during lunge frames.

07_aegis_carapace.glb.name: The Aegis Carapace
07_aegis_carapace.glb.kind: insectoid creature with riot-shield front shell

mechanic_hooks.Deflection: Large front shell should use a directional block collider/material response.
mechanic_hooks.Vault-Over Vulnerability: Rear abdomen is colored as the exposed weak point after vaulting.

07_aegis_carapace.glb.recommended_runtime_notes: Use frontal cone/box detection for deflection and rear hitbox for actual damage.

08_venom_spitter.glb.name: The Venom-Spitter

mechanic_hooks.Telegraphed Projectiles: Acid globe and yellow indicator arcs show projectile warning state.
mechanic_hooks.Projectile Reversal: Mouth/nozzle is projectile spawn socket; reversed projectile can target head collider.

08_venom_spitter.glb.recommended_runtime_notes: Use procedural projectile mesh/VFX at runtime rather than the held acid globe if desired.
